标题: Claude Opus 4.7 Released: 87.6% SWE-bench, 1M Context Window
内容摘要: Anthropic drops Claude Opus 4.7 on April 16. SWE-bench Verified 87.6%, 1M token context, enhanced vision. $5/$25 per million tokens. Available on Claude.ai, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Foundry.

标题: OpenAI Shuts Down Sora 2 Consumer App, API Ends Sept 24
内容摘要: OpenAI officially shut down Sora 2 consumer app on April 26. Disney $1B IP deal cancelled. API deprecated with Sept 24 sunset. Strategic pivot to enterprise/coding ahead of IPO.

标题: Pentagon Signs $54B AI Contract with OpenAI, Google, NVIDIA
内容摘要: May 1: US DoD contracts 7 tech giants for classified AI deployment. Models access IL-6/IL-7 networks for targeting and battle planning. Anthropic excluded over safety objections.

标题: EU AI Act Effective May 3: First Comprehensive AI Regulation
内容摘要: World's first comprehensive AI regulation now in force. Unacceptable risk banned, high-risk sectors require human oversight, GPAI models need transparency reports. Fines up to 7% global turnover.

标题: GPT-5.5 Drops April 23: Codex Desktop + Prism Research Edition
内容摘要: OpenAI confirms GPT-5.5 release. Codex desktop agent for autonomous coding, Prism for scientific literature analysis, 40% enterprise API performance boost. Subscription pricing increased.
Anthropic's secret weapon leaked. Mythos Preview SWE-bench 93.9%, SWE-bench Pro 77.8%. Project Glasswing exclusive access for 12 top institutions. $100M usage credits committed.

标题: Google I/O 2026 May 19-20: Major Gemini Updates Expected
内容摘要: Google I/O 2026 confirmed for May 19-20 at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Gemini model updates, Agentic Coding, Android AI integration headline. Brin personally driving DeepMind to match Claude.

标题: Seedance 2.0 vs Kling 3.0 vs Veo 3.1: The Post-Sora Battle
内容摘要: ByteDance Seedance 2.0 in CapCut (2K, 4-modal input). Kuaishou Kling 3.0 (4K/60fps, AI director). Google Veo 3.1 (audio gen). Runway Gen-4.5 (Motion Brush 3.0). Who wins the AI video war?

标题: Gemini 3.1 Deep Research Adds MCP, Native Charts, Streaming
内容摘要: Google Gemini Deep Research major May update: MCP protocol for enterprise data, native chart/infographic generation, collaborative planning, real-time streaming output. Research agent capabilities leapfrog.

标题: Digital Replica Rights Act: AI Videos Must Have Visible Watermarks
内容摘要: New law requires visible digital watermarks on all AI-generated videos containing human likeness. Junior VFX compositor roles down 40% globally. New 'AI Cinematographer' role emerging at $80K+ salaries.
